value.title: Feedback control for no-insulation high-temperature superconducting magnet

value.title: Power supply for MRI magnets
value.assignee: Picker Nordstar Oy (later Philips Medical Systems MR Technologies Finland Oy)
value.status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (lapsed 2004-12-01) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: dual-feedback MRI supply tailoring output impedance for 0.1 ppm regulation
value.indep_claim_gist: MRI power supply with voltage and current feedback loops setting output impedance at least 3 orders above magnet impedance at low frequency (current-source regulation) and at least 1 order below at high frequency (disturbance attenuation).
value.notes: Expiry-horizon anchor for ppm-class supply loop art: displays as expired 2004 — verify before reliance. Prior-art ceiling for WS-P06-2 combination claims. U-015, U-030.

value.title: Compact, two stage, zero flux electronically compensated current or voltage transducer employing dual magnetic cores having substantially dissimilar magnetic characteristics
value.status_note: Granted as US8421444B2/US8901919B2; displays Active, expiry 2031-07-07; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: two-stage zero-flux transducer, dissimilar dual cores, <±100 ppm class
value.indep_claim_gist: Actively compensated current ratio transformer with lower-permeability main core and >=3x higher-permeability sense core, primary/measurement/sense windings, amplifier driving sense-winding voltage to substantially zero plus electronic magnetization-error compensation injection.
value.notes: Live component-level zero-flux art (meter class 0.1); reads on dual-core compensated CT builds, not on converter integration. Cited by LEM US9841441B2 lineage. Design-around: single-core fluxgate or bought-in transducer. U-033.

value.title: Electrical current transducer
value.assignee: LEM International SA (as displayed; LEM Intellectual Property lineage)
value.status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related on GP (would run to 2035-12-11); indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: U-profile core housing protecting winding during transducer manufacture
value.indep_claim_gist: Current transducer whose U-shaped insulating core housing has inner/outer wall edges extending beyond core thickness that fold inward under the secondary winding, protecting wire at core corners without a two-part bobbin.
value.notes: LEM modern estate includes packaging/manufacture-level claims; CN family member CN105652058B granted. Displays expired-fee-related — verify. U-033.

value.title: Detector circuit to be used for measuring current
value.assignee: Danfysik A/S (transferred to Liaisons Electroniques-Mecaniques LEM SA)
value.status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (lapse noted 2020) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: zero-flux DCCT detector: antiphase auxiliary transformers, pilgrim-wound compensation
value.indep_claim_gist: Detector circuit for measuring high currents using auxiliary transformers magnetized in antiphase and a compensating winding wound section-at-a-time (pilgrim winding) to cut inter-layer potential differences and parasitic capacitance resonances.
value.notes: The Danfysik ULTRASTAB-lineage DCCT circuit that seeded LEM IT/ITN class and Danisense founders; CN family member CN1808133B (displays expired 2010). Displays expired — classic zero-flux chain design-usable subject to verification. U-033, U-015.

value.title: Limit cycle oscillation suppression system and method for particle accelerator power supply
value.title_zh: 粒子加速器电源限环振荡抑制系统及抑制方法
value.assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co., Ltd. 西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司
value.status_note: Displays as Pending (A publication) on GP; claims can still change; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: sigma-delta + DSP HRPWM resolution matching to kill digital-loop limit cycles
value.indep_claim_gist: Accelerator power-supply control system: ADC sampling, dual-loop PI, sigma-delta modulator accumulating quantization residue across control cycles feeding DSP high-resolution PWM, suppressing limit-cycle oscillation from PWM/ADC resolution mismatch without added hardware.
value.notes: Only active CN merchant filing found squarely on ppm-class digital-loop implementation; pending — watch grant scope. Design-around: hardware DAC resolution or dither-outside-loop. U-015, U-034, U-035.

value.title: Fluxgate current transducer with an analog measurement channel
value.status_note: Issued 2025-01-21; legal-status line not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
value.claim_theme: fluxgate transducer with auxiliary analog measurement channel and reference compensation
value.indep_claim_gist: Fluxgate transducer: saturable-core excitation coil split into two switch-driven windings; analog measurement channel with ADC, DAC and comparator detecting peak excitation current at core saturation; reference source compensating ADC ratiometricity error.
value.notes: Live to ~2041 (est. from 2021-07-20 EP 21186819.5 priority; PCT/EP2022/069946). Verified at FPO full text during GP 503 window per A-07; GP search separately displayed number as US12203964B2. Fences mixed-signal fluxgate electronics, not converter integration. U-033, U-030.

value.title: Closed-loop fluxgate current sensor
value.assignee: Liaisons Electroniques-Mecaniques LEM SA (as displayed at FPO: LEM Liaisons Electron Mec; inventors Teppan, Azzoni)
value.status_note: WO application; national/EP fate not displayed at fetched page. 2010-05-10 is the displayed international filing date; 18-month publication rule implies ~2009-05 priority — verify at GP
value.claim_theme: dual-mode wide-range closed-loop fluxgate measurement
value.indep_claim_gist: Current sensor with saturable core measuring a wide range via two modes: saturation-time evaluation for small primary currents and average excitation-current evaluation for large currents, operated closed-loop.
value.notes: Verified at FPO full text per A-07. First-run attribution to Isotel/Platise corrected — this family is LEM's. EP2430469B1 listed from same-title GP search hit; family link indicative, verify page-level. ~2030 horizon (est.). U-033.

value.title: Method for calibrating a current transducer of the rogowski type
value.status_note: Issued 2016-11-29; legal-status line not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
value.claim_theme: transducer self-calibration by electronic measurement of coil self-inductance
value.indep_claim_gist: Calibrating a Rogowski-type current transducer by determining and correcting its sensitivity through measurement of the coil self-inductance by the connected electronic device (step-response or frequency analysis), without external reference current.
value.notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Nearest fetched art to WS-P06-1: self-calibration stays transducer-internal and AC/Rogowski — not DCCT-chain, not converter-integrated. ~2032 horizon (est.). U-033, U-018.

value.title: Fluxgate current transducer
value.status_note: Issued 2025-11-11; legal-status line not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
value.claim_theme: FPGA with 1-bit sigma-delta ADCs replacing DSP in fluxgate transducer electronics
value.indep_claim_gist: Fluxgate current transducer whose controller is an FPGA integrating one-bit sigma-delta ADC front-ends, replacing DSP microcontrollers for excitation control and signal processing to cut cost and size at equal accuracy.
value.notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Live to ~2041 (est.; EP 21164001.6 priority, PCT/EP2022/056763). With US12203964B2 shows LEM fencing digital transducer electronics 2021-2025. Kind B2 per PCT-derived pre-grant publication. U-033.

value.title: Portable magnet power supply for a superconducting magnet and a method for removing energy from a superconducting magnet using a portable magnet power supply
value.status_note: Issued 2014-04-15; legal-status and kind code not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
value.claim_theme: portable rundown supply with phase-change heat storage for SC magnet service
value.notes: Verified at FPO per A-07; abstract-depth. FPO displayed US class 361/141 only; CPC not captured. Landscape datum: Western major files at service-tooling level (energy removal, PCM heatsink), not regulation level. ~2031 horizon (est.). U-030.

value.title: Temperature-Compensated Current Sensing and Shunt Arrangements
value.status_note: A1 publication; grant status not checked at fetched page — indicative
value.claim_theme: temperature element in amplifier feedback path corrects shunt drift
value.indep_claim_gist: Current-sense circuit placing a temperature-sensing element in the operational amplifier's negative-feedback path so amplifier gain tracks and cancels the shunt resistance change with temperature.
value.notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Nearest fetched art to WS-P06-3 shunt-side thermal correction; aerospace sensing context, not converter-embedded ppm chain. U-033, U-030.

value.title: State space feedback controller in the digital domain for an MRI gradient coil power supply
value.status_note: A1 publication; grant status not checked at fetched page — indicative
value.claim_theme: all-digital state-space gradient-current controller with loop-delay compensation
value.indep_claim_gist: Fully digital state-space feedback controller for MRI gradient supply: integrates desired-vs-measured coil-current deviation, generates digital PWM drive values, and feeds back multi-cycle-delayed outputs to compensate system delays for mA-class dynamic accuracy.
value.notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Shows live Western precision-loop claims sit MRI-gradient-side (dynamic mA accuracy), not merchant ppm DC stability. U-014.

value.title: High-precision pulse power supply regulator and method based on frequency domain
value.title_zh: 基于频域的高精度脉冲电源调节器及方法
value.assignee: Xi'an Institute of Optics and Precision Mechanics, CAS (current assignee QXP Technologies Inc., 2022 transfer, as displayed)
value.status_note: Displays Active on GP, anticipated expiration 2034-12-20; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: DDS+FPGA+DAC frequency-domain setpoint synthesis replacing lookup tables
value.notes: Abstract-depth. Pulse-supply waveform/setpoint synthesis (bit-by-bit voltage regulation, low memory); adjacent to setting-resolution theme but pulse/laser application, not magnet ppm DC loop. CPC not captured at fetch. U-015. | also surfaced in P07: DDS + FPGA + high-precision DAC frequency-domain pulse power-supply regulator

value.title: High precision digital power supply control regulating apparatus
value.title_zh: 高精度数字电源控制调节器
value.assignee: Tianshui Electric Drive Research Institute Group Co Ltd 天水电气传动研究所
value.status_note: Displays deemed withdrawn after publication (2011) on GP — no live claims; indicative
value.claim_theme: FPGA soft-core digital regulator replacing analog magnet-PS regulators
value.notes: Abstract-depth. Historical: CN digital-regulator wave started 2008 (text reports 7.1e-5/8 h output-current stability); withdrawn, design-usable subject to verification. Resolves first-run Tianshui queue item. U-035.

value.title: System for accelerator excitation curve conversion
value.title_zh: 一种用于加速器励磁曲线转换的系统
value.assignee: Institute of High Energy Physics CAS; Spallation Neutron Source Science Center
value.status_note: WO displays Ceased on GP; CN family members display granted 2023-2026 (live); indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: bidirectional field-to-current (I/B) conversion layer for accelerator supply types
value.indep_claim_gist: System converting physicist-set magnetic-field values into per-supply current values and back in real time, supporting DC, preset-pulse, bump-rail and floating power supplies across an accelerator facility.
value.notes: CN priority 202110753262.5. Facility-software claim family between control room and converters; five granted CN members to ~2041 (est.). No US/EP entry observed — CN-market exposure only. FPO copy was abstract-only and rejected; GP-verified after recovery. U-032, U-018. | also surfaced in P10: real-time bidirectional magnet-field/current excitation-curve conversion serving many supplies

value.title: Fluxgate heavy current sensor based on digital second harmonic detection and ripple compensation
value.title_zh: 基于数字二次谐波检测与纹波补偿的磁通门大电流传感器
value.assignee: ShanghaiTech University (current co-assignee Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co Ltd, as displayed)
value.status_note: Displays Granted/Active on GP; B-publication number not captured at fetch; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: digital second-harmonic fluxgate, LF/HF dual path, algorithmic ripple compensation
value.indep_claim_gist: Fluxgate high-current sensor: three coils on annular core (low-frequency measuring, feedback, high-frequency measuring); digital second-harmonic detection recovers DC flux, mutual-inductance path covers HF, compensation signal cancels modulation ripple; digital output with zero-drift correction.
value.notes: CN component electronics going digital; United Imaging co-assignment signals medical-magnet pull. CN-market risk for digital-demodulation DCCT-class builds. Est. horizon ~2039. U-033.

value.title: Standardized power supply controller of ion accelerator and dynamic local reconfigurable method thereof
value.title_zh: 离子加速器标准化电源控制器及其动态局部可重配置方法
value.assignee: Institute of Modern Physics, CAS 中国科学院近代物理研究所
value.status_note: Displays Active on GP, anticipated expiration 2042-09-20; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: ARM+FPGA standardized accelerator-PS controller, EPICS supports, runtime-reconfigurable modules
value.indep_claim_gist: Unified accelerator power-supply controller: ARM+FPGA hardware with standardized interfaces; embedded EPICS application exposing 11 standard device supports (reference-waveform control, AI/AO, quench protection); FPGA regulator framework whose ADC, filtering, protection, algorithm and pulse-modulation modules are dynamically locally reconfigurable at runtime.
value.notes: The IMP platform claim from the first-run queue. CN-market exposure for controller/EPICS-integration products; no US/EP members observed. U-032, U-034, U-035.

value.title: Debugging and real-time monitoring system and method for accelerator multi-module power supply
value.title_zh: 一种用于加速器多模块电源的调试与实时监测系统及方法
value.assignee: Institute of Modern Physics, CAS 中国科学院近代物理研究所
value.status_note: Displays Pending (A publication) on GP; claims can still change; indicative
value.claim_theme: SFP-linked multi-module PS digital commissioning with 1 ms real-time monitoring
value.notes: Abstract-depth. Facility-internal commissioning/monitoring (FPGA main controller, UDP, FIFO/SDRAM buffering, 100 ns debug resolution) — fleet-monitoring adjacency to WS-P06-5, not calibration transfer. U-018, U-032.

value.title: Ultralow-output-voltage-ripple diode-clamped multi-level direct-current converter and direct-current power supply
value.title_zh: 极低输出电压纹波二极管钳位多电平直流变换器及直流电源
value.assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co Ltd (current assignee Beijing Lanjun Electrical Equipment Co Ltd, 2020 transfer, as displayed)
value.status_note: Displays Active on GP, anticipated expiration 2034-11-29; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: seven-level diode-clamped DC converter topology for ultra-low output ripple
value.indep_claim_gist: Diode-clamped multilevel DC converter: three-level input stage, eight self-turn-off devices and three transformers synthesizing seven output levels (±Uin/2kT, ±Uin/3kT, ±Uin/6kT, 0) giving ultra-low output ripple with continuous input current and reduced filtering.
value.notes: The first-run 'Actionpower 2014 seven-level' item. Topology-level ripple claim aimed at magnet/accelerator supplies; assigned out to Beijing Lanjun 2020 (enforcement posture unclear). CN-market topology risk only. U-014, U-030.

value.title: Method and device for verifying high-accuracy direct-current comparator
value.title_zh: 高准确度直流电流比较仪的验证方法和装置
value.assignee: 514 Institute of China Academy of Space Technology (CAST metrology institute)
value.status_note: Displays Active on GP, anticipated expiration 2030-12-20 (priority derived from displayed expiration); indicative
value.claim_theme: series-parallel resistor-array bench verification of 1e-7/1e-8 DCC bridges
value.indep_claim_gist: Verification method/device for 1e-7 to 1e-8-class DC current comparators: nominally identical resistors combined series/parallel via four-terminal hexahedral nodes with potential- and current-compensation resistors; products of ratio indications across 10/100/1000-ohm arrays bound comparator error without lead-resistance artifacts.
value.notes: Nearest fetched CN art to WS-P06-5: metrology-bench verification of the comparator itself, not fleet calibration-transfer across converters. U-018.

value.title: Zero magnetic flux direct-current current transformer electronic measurement unit error detection device
value.title_zh: 零磁通直流电流互感器电子测量单元误差检测装置
value.assignee: State Grid Corporation of China and affiliated entities
value.status_note: Displays Expired on GP (10-year utility-model term ended 2024-07-15); indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: automated field error-detection rig for HVDC zero-flux DCCT electronics
value.notes: CN utility-model dimension per playbook. Grid-side (HVDC) DCCT electronic-unit test rig (0.01-level DC source, IEEE488 multimeters, DSP acquisition), expired-displayed. Shows CN test/verification art clusters grid-side, not accelerator-side. U-018.

value.title: High-power four-quadrant converter system
value.title_zh: 一种大功率四象限变流器系统 (CN priority member)
value.assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS
value.status_note: Active, expires 2044-08-05 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: kA-class 4Q system: double-secondary transformer, anti-parallel thyristor bridge pairs
value.indep_claim_gist: Converter system with double-secondary oil-immersed transformer feeding four thyristor rectifier bridges; bridge pairs share secondaries, inversely connected for forward/reverse output; reactor-based parallel current sharing; controller executes smooth four-quadrant current transitions (>100 kA class).
value.notes: CN priority member CN115940665A ALSO fetched run 1 at GP (pending there). Live to ~2044. Line-commutated thyristor scope — does not read on SiC PWM stages per se, but broad 4Q-system + current-sharing language is the main live CN-institute estate; design-around: PWM/WBG topologies, no shared-secondary anti-parallel pairs. U-014, U-018, U-020.

value.title: A high-power and high-current aluminum alloy converter module with four-quadrant operation
value.title_zh: 一种四象限运行的高功率大电流铝合金制变流模块
value.status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2018-07-27) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: modular 6-pulse anti-parallel bridges, water-cooled Al busbars, 12/18/24-pulse 4Q
value.indep_claim_gist: Modular six-pulse converter bridge in open non-in-phase anti-parallel structure using water-cooled aluminum-alloy bar conductors; multiple bridges combine to 12/18/24-pulse modules supporting four-quadrant operation for fusion magnet and electrolysis supplies.
value.notes: Displays as expired (fee) after only 2 years — ASIPP construction-claim posture, not maintained. Anchors CN facility-4Q expiry horizon; citation chase off this doc yielded CN115940665A family (verified) and CN115548795B (verified this pass). U-018 context.

value.title: Driving gradient coils of magnetic resonance imaging apparatus
value.status_note: Displays as Expired - Lifetime (anticipated expiration 2020-08-16) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: modular gradient amplifier: unipolar-PWM modules + polarity-reversing output module
value.indep_claim_gist: Gradient amplifier with multiple first modules providing unipolar PWM control of DC input to generate unipolar waveforms, and at least one second module between first-module outputs and gradient coil selectively reversing polarity to produce bipolar drive waveforms.
value.notes: Family tie CONFIRMED this pass: US6323649B1 (Picker International, filed 1999-09-14, same modular unipolar-PWM + polarity-module claims, 24 claims) fetched at https://www.freepatentsonline.com/6323649.html per A-07. Displays expired 2020 — verify. THE architecture precedent for stacked-unipolar + polarity-block bipolar coil drive; design-freedom indicator. U-015 CC-loop context.

value.title: Bi-lateral four quadrant power converter
value.assignee: GTE Automatic Electric Laboratories Inc (later AG Communication Systems)
value.status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (lapsed 1995-08-16) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: isolated PWM 4Q converter, synchronous rectification, source and sink
value.indep_claim_gist: PWM power converter supplying variable-amplitude variable-polarity output while enabling bidirectional current flow, via synchronous rectifier switches driven from the same carrier as primary pulses through one high-frequency transformer, with low-pass output filtering.
value.notes: Telecom-lineage true-4Q heritage; lapsed 1995 (displays — verify). With US5428522A, US5317254A, US3566292A, US7710745B2 the classic 4Q layer is indicatively public domain — supports U-030 BOP-successor freedom read.

value.title: Four quadrant unipolar pulse width modulated inverter
value.assignee: Kaman Electromagnetics Corp (later DRS Power Technology)
value.status_note: Displays as Expired - Lifetime on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: H-bridge 4Q unipolar-PWM current control into inductive load, halved switching loss
value.indep_claim_gist: H-bridge with switching elements and antiparallel diodes controlled by algorithm alternating instantaneous load voltage between single-polarity and zero states to keep current within defined boundaries around the demanded value in an inductive load.
value.notes: Displays expired — verify. Canonical unipolar-PWM 4Q current-mode control of inductive loads (ripple-frequency doubling); prior-art floor constraining new control-method claims while freeing implementation. U-014, U-030 context.

value.title: Phase-shifting control full-bridge zero-current converter and DC switching power source
value.title_zh: 相移控制全桥零电流转换器及直流开关电源
value.assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co., Ltd. (西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司)
value.status_note: Displays as rejected after publication (2019-03-15) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: phase-shift full-bridge ZCS lagging arm via auxiliary low-voltage MOS + blocking cap
value.indep_claim_gist: Phase-shift full-bridge converter integrating two series low-voltage MOS transistors with blocking capacitor at transformer primary achieving zero-current switching of lagging bridge arm while retaining ZVS on leading arm across load range.
value.notes: The one on-point GP-indexed ORGANIC filing for the CN fast-control leader (CS-G card 1) — REJECTED 2019. But see CN102751772A (verified this pass): 爱科赛博 DOES hold a live XJTU-acquired bidirectional family. Posture: 198-patent portfolio (2025 IR) not visible as magnet-converter claims. U-034, U-035 context.

value.title: Three-inductance and double-Buck inverter
value.title_zh: 三电感双Buck逆变器
value.assignee: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
value.status_note: Granted 2016-04-20; displays as Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2021-09-05) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: three-inductor dual-buck bridge, reduced filter magnetics, shoot-through-free class
value.indep_claim_gist: Inverter with two switch tubes and diodes in bridge arms, dual DC filter inductors spanning bridge midpoints plus one AC filter inductor to output capacitor and load, shrinking magnetic volume versus classic dual-buck.
value.notes: Representative of the CN academic dual-buck estate (shoot-through-immune bipolar output stages — a natural SiC 4Q building block). Displays expired-fee 2021 — indicatively unencumbered topology class in CN; verify before reliance. U-014 design-freedom context.

value.title: Interleaved multi-channel, multi-level, multi-quadrant DC-DC converters
value.status_note: Active, expires 2034-12-28 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: interleaved parallel multi-quadrant multi-level DC-DC subcircuits minimizing terminal ripple
value.indep_claim_gist: DC-DC converter: two or more multi-quadrant multi-level switching subcircuits paralleled at input and output, common DC input having three or more voltage levels; control interleaves per-phase duty-cycled switching to reduce input- and output-side ripple current.
value.notes: Verified twice this run: FPO full text (https://www.freepatentsonline.com/10978948.html) during 503 window, then GP after recovery. Top live architectural blocker for an interleaved multi-level SiC 4Q stage; design-around hinge = the 3+-level-input limitation (two-level phases), single-subcircuit multiphase, or coupled-inductor cancellation. FPO displays PCT/US2015/063736; WO2015108613A1 sibling NOT confirmed (GP displays only US20160329811A1). U-014, U-015.

value.title: Synchrotron magnet power supply control system and control method, and synchrotron
value.status_note: WO publication; international filing date shown, earlier priority and national-phase status NOT displayed on FPO page fetched; indicative
family: JP national phase presumed - verify at GP
value.claim_theme: shared main acceleration pattern + per-magnet corrective patterns summed to magnet supplies
value.notes: FPO biblio+abstract depth per A-07 (claims not rendered). Computer manages one shared main pattern + individual corrective patterns; control devices sum and drive each bending-magnet PS. Indicative national expiry ~2031. Control-pattern claims, not converter hardware — nearest control-side art to WS-P07-4 array orchestration; P08 seam. U-017. | also surfaced in P08: shared main pattern + per-magnet corrective patterns distributed to many supplies

value.title: State space controller and gradient power amplifier
value.assignee: Shanghai Neusoft Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
value.status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; indicative expiry ~2038 (20y from US filing 2018-07-10) — verify before reliance
family: CN201710561177.2 (CN priority application as displayed on FPO)
value.claim_theme: delay-compensated state-space digital current controller for gradient power amplifier
value.indep_claim_gist: State-space controller: integrator of gradient-coil current deviation plus delay compensator with exactly two delayed feedback taps (one- and two-cycle delays, weighted by compensation coefficients) subtracted at an error node, generating PWM drive for the power stack.
value.notes: CN-family via CN priority 201710561177.2 (2017-07-11). Narrow digital-implementation claim ('only two feedback loops') — alternative compensator structures avoid. Nearest art to WS-P07-1 control half. U-015 context.

value.title: Method/system for switched frequency ripple reduction in MRI gradient coils
value.status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; 20y-from-filing indicative expiry 2023-08-01 — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: transformer-coupled out-of-phase ripple-injection network at the gradient coil
value.indep_claim_gist: Gradient coil system: first inductor feeds switched-amplifier current to the coil; a second inductor, transformer-coupled to the first with series capacitor returned to the amplifier, delivers a second current substantially out of phase, cancelling switching ripple at the coil.
value.notes: Expired-class (indicative 2023) coupled-inductor ripple cancellation AT a coil load — narrows WS-P07-2 absence to live/non-MRI/WBG space; freedom-supporting floor with US6437999B1. U-014, U-015 context.

value.title: Power output stage for bipolar operational power supply
value.status_note: Expired-class by age (1971 grant); FPO renders biblio + PDF only for pre-OCR era; indicative
value.claim_theme: linear bipolar operational power supply output stage (Kepco-BOP heritage)
value.notes: Biblio-depth record (claims not rendered on page). Forbro = Kepco-affiliated design lineage; anchors the U-030 BOP heritage floor for WS-P07-5.

value.title: Bipolar power supply system
value.status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; 20y-from-filing indicative expiry ~2025-08-04 (+unknown PTA) — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: series-stacked positive+negative supplies steered by programming-voltage threshold, no mechanical polarity switch
value.indep_claim_gist: Bipolar supply: negative and positive supplies connected in series; control circuit compares a programming voltage to a 1.6 V reference and selectively activates one supply, switching output polarity without mechanical devices; output current proportional to the voltage difference.
value.notes: Borderline expiry (indicative ~2025 + unknown PTA) — risk set low, not none, until verified. Architecture midway between polarity-reversal (Heinzinger-style) and true 4Q. U-030, U-014 context.

value.title: Power electronic circuits with ripple current cancellation
value.status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; 20y-from-filing indicative expiry 2021-05-12 — verify before reliance

value.claim_theme: yarn clearer detects defect; cut; splice decision logic from sensor result
value.indep_claim_gist: Winder with yarn defect sensor, shutoff/cutter, piecing device; controller judges whether to splice from defect-sensor result before continuing winding.
value.notes: CN-jurisdiction zh-pass record: defect-triggered cut/splice control claimed in CN.

value.title: Resistance spot welding quality on-line monitoring method
value.title_zh: 电阻点焊质量在线监测方法
value.status_note: Active, expires 2034-11-04 as displayed; indicative
value.claim_theme: Online dynamic-resistance spot-weld QC with qualification-probability prediction
value.indep_claim_gist: Method: acquire welding current and inter-electrode voltage during welding; compute dynamic resistance (V/I); cluster-analyze the curve against production data to predict joint qualification probability online.
value.notes: Not FTO risk to ID_04; 102/103 art — in-fixture resistance QC + quality-probability prediction outside superconductivity. CPC not captured at fetch. IPRT_04 closest new patent.

value.title: System for evaluating battery connection quality
value.status_note: Active, expires 2037-04-21 as displayed; indicative
value.claim_theme: Production QC: current through battery weld, resistance vs acceptance range, pass/fail output
value.indep_claim_gist: System: controller drives supplied current across an electrical connection, measures voltage/resistance, compares calculated resistance to predetermined min/max nugget-resistance range, outputs measurement-error / failed-weld / acceptable-weld determination.
value.notes: 103 art vs ID_04 I1 controller limb (accept/reject on measured joint R in manufacturing); battery-tab kill line (b).

value.title: Apparatus for controlling the quality of a resistance spot weld and method therefor
value.status_note: Expired - fee related as displayed - verify before reliance; indicative
value.claim_theme: Dynamic-resistance-curve weld quality control gating weld current
value.indep_claim_gist: RSW apparatus: sense weld current from primary circuit; calculate power factors; obtain dynamic resistance curve; generate gate signal controlling weld current from the curve; nugget estimate compared to thresholds adjusts next-period current.
value.notes: 103 art vs D5 (resistance-driven closed-loop process control, 1990s); resistance calculated from primary circuit, not measured at joint.

value.title: Method for detecting welding firmness of lithium ion battery tab
value.title_zh: 锂离子电池极耳焊接牢固性的检测方法
value.assignee: New Materials (Yancheng) Co Ltd GCL Power (orig.); Suzhou GCL Energy Technology Development Co Ltd (current)
value.status_note: Granted/active as displayed on A-publication page; indicative
value.claim_theme: Battery tab weld firmness via mΩ resistance measurement + statistical accept/reject
value.indep_claim_gist: Method: measure DC resistance of welded tab joints (~3 mΩ class); F-test and t-test against reference resistance population; flag substandard product on statistical difference.
value.notes: zh battery-tab kill line; joint-resistance-based accept/reject outside superconductivity. CPC/family not captured at fetch.

value.title: Surge comparison type coil tester
value.status_note: Expired-Lifetime as displayed on GP; indicative
value.claim_theme: surge pulse to coil under test, waveform-identity pass/fail vs reference coil
value.indep_claim_gist: Pulse source with differentiating means applies surge to test and reference coils; current waveforms compared; coil judged defect-free if waveforms substantially identical, defective if they differ.
value.notes: IPRT_05 obviousness base: 50-year-old single-wound-coil transient grading art; modern stored-master successors are commercial (HIOKI ST4030A, NPL-2).

value.title: Compensation coil device for high-temperature superconducting magnet testing
value.title_zh: 用于高温超导磁体测试的补偿线圈装置
value.assignee: Institute of Electrical Engineering, Chinese Academy of Sciences
value.status_note: Displays lapsed fee-related 2015-06-17 on GP; indicative; priority/filing date as displayed circa 2008 — verify at merge
cpc: H01F6/00-adjacent (containers/cooling for superconductive devices as displayed)
value.claim_theme: variable-mutual-inductance compensation cancels L·di/dt during HTS coil ramp tests
value.indep_claim_gist: Coaxial primary/rotatable secondary coils; mutual inductance tuned to magnet inductance so measured voltage becomes U=UR+(L-M)di/dt, exposing resistive signal during LN2/cryo coil testing.
value.notes: Missed by PL_P04 ZH pass: CN institute coil-level cryo test-instrument art since ~2008; dead, free art. Weakens the 'no CN coil-level instrument art' openness note (W-06 O-score).

value.title: Taper tension control method of winding process for web handling system
value.assignee: University Industry Cooperation Corporation of Konkuk University
value.status_note: Displays Expired - Fee Related on GP (maintenance-fee lapse recorded 2016-05-31; adjusted expiration shown 2029-02-02); indicative — verify before reliance
value.claim_theme: generic web-handling taper tension: radius-scheduled linear/hyperbolic/hybrid tension profiles for roll radial stress and telescoping
value.indep_claim_gist: Method: input material parameters to a PLC; read roll diameter from the motor drive; set a target taper value; select a linear/hyperbolic/hybrid taper profile against radial stress distribution and telescoping; output tension-control signals so winding tension varies with roll radius.
value.notes: Fetched for ID_02 as the generic-floor reference: radius-dependent tension trajectories per se are old in web handling; page mentions no superconducting tape, contact resistance, or electrical property of the wound product (checked this fetch). Forces the ID_02 claim spine onto the target-Rc compilation limitation; lead 103 combination risk with US20230238178A1.
